# Elementary stream descriptor

**Data field**

An elementary stream descriptor for MPEG-4 audio.

## Overview

As defined in the MPEG-4 specification ISO/IEC 14496.

## Data fields

- **Size**: An unsigned 32-bit integer holding the size of the elementary stream descriptor atom.
- **Type**: An unsigned 32-bit field.
- **Version**: An unsigned 32-bit integer set to zero.
